title: Figures (Cover by N.A.)
lyrics: Figures, I gave you a ride to die and you gave me games, love Figures, I know I'm crying cause you just won't change, love Figures, I gave it all and you gave me shit, love Figures, wish I could do exactly what you did, wish I could hurt you back Love, what would you do if you couldn't get me back, oh You're the one who's gonna lose something so special, something so real Tell me boy, how in the f*** would you feel if you couldn't get me back, oh That's what I wish that I could do to you, you Ooh, ooh, love to you, you Ooh, ooh Figures, I'm the bad guy cause I can't learn to trust, love Figures, you say sorry once and you think it's enough Line up of girls and line up of guys, begging for me just to give them a try Figures, I'm willing to stay cause I'm sick for your love, wish I could hurt you back, oh Love, what would you do if you couldn't get me back, no You're the one who's gonna lose something so special, something so real Tell me boy, how in the f*** would you feel if you couldn't get me back, oh That's what I wish that I could do to you, you Ooh, ooh, love to you, you Ooh, ooh, love, figure, girl Figures, I'm the bad guy cause I can't learn to trust, love    Thank you for watching!

Ooh, ooh

Thank you for watching!
